title: Puberty and the Evolution of Developmental Science.
author_string: Worthman, Carol M, Dockray, Samantha, Marceau, Kristine
journal_full: Journal of research on adolescence : the official journal of the Society for Research on Adolescence
abstract: In recent decades, theoretical and methodological advances have operated synergistically to advance understanding of puberty and prompt increasingly comprehensive models that engage with the temporal, psychosocial, and biological dimensions of this maturational milepost. This integrative overview discusses these theoretical and methodological advances and their implications for research and intervention to promote human development in the context of changing maturational schedules and massive ongoing social transformations.
